ASBESTOS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-04-2014 Off Calendar

ASBESTOS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-06-2013 Continued To Jun-05-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 503

Petition To Approve Compromise Of Pending Action
Off Calendar Apr-23-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for a Hearing on a Minor's Compromise.
Department 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Lewis Gillian, #12355.
Maureen C. McGowan, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff(s) Petitioner: Derek Tisinger, II, son and Guardian ad Litem of person with disabililty.
Order for waiver of appearance of Laura Tisinger at hearing on file.

After testimony and consideration of the evidence presented, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved as follows:
Total Settlement: $9,203.80
Attorney's Fees: $2,934.11 payable Brayton & Purcell LLP.
Reimbursement for medical and all other expenses paid by the petitioner or the petitioner's attorney in the amount of $1,225.43.
A net balance of $5,044.26 the balance shall be distributed to Mary M. Gates as conservator of the Estate of Laura Tisinger.
Future settlements from other defendants in this action, as may be recommended by counsel (including bankruptcy or class claims) may be accepted by MARY M. GATES, Conservator of the estate of LAURA TISINGER, an adult person with a disability, and that 8% of the net settlements, after attorneys' fees (ranging from 25% to 40% depending upon trial date and/or bankruptcy proceeding) and 8% of costs are deducted, be distributed in the name of MARY M. GATES as Conservator of the Estate of LAURA TISINGER without the necessity of further petition being made to this court.
Order signed.

Off Calendar Apr-13-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Katherine Allen, Esq. of BRAYTON & PURCELL (415-898-1555), appearing for plaintiffs / moving parties BRITTIE RATEKIN, JUDI FARR, MICHAEL RATEKIN, MARK RATEKIN, MARY GATES, LAURA TISINGER and petitioner Jennifer Valentino
No other appearances.

RULING:
Plaintiffs BRITTIE RATEKIN, JUDI FARR, MICHAEL RATEKIN, MARK RATEKIN, MARY GATES, LAURA TISINGER and petitioner Jennifer Valentino's motion for order to realign defendant-heir Jennifer Valentino as plaintiff is granted. Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Granting Leave To File First Amendment To Complaint To Add Proper Plaintiff To Action
Off Calendar Jul-31-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF Brittie Ratekin, as Wrongful Death Heir, and as Successor-in-Interst to Douglas Ratekin, Deceased; and Judi Farr, Michael Ratekin, Mark Ratekin, Mary Gates, as Legal Heirs of Douglas Ratekin, Deceased, Motion For Order Granting Leave To File First Amendment To Complaint To Add Proper Plaintiff To Action.
